title: Aao Aao Ganjanan
lyrics:
Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Bhole Shankar Ke Putr Gajanan,
Gaura Maiya Ke Putr Gajanan,
Aake Bhakton Ke Man Ko Bhao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Riddhi Siddhi Ko Sang Mein Laana,
Gaura Maiya Ko Bhool Na Jaana,
Aane Mein Der Na Lagao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Hum Sabke Pyare Gajanan,
Sab Devon Se Nyare Gajanan,
Aake Kirtan Mein Ras Barsao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

title: Ghar Mein Padharo
lyrics:
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Riddhi Siddhi Leke Aaro Ganaraaja, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Ram Ji Aana, Lakshaman Ji Aana,
Sang Mein Laana Sita Maiya, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Brahma Ji Aana, Vishnu Ji Aaana,
Bhole Shanker Ji Ko Le Aana, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Lakshmi Ji Aana, Gauri Ji Aana,
Saraswati Maiya Ko Le Aana, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

Vighna Ko Harana, Mangal Karanaa,
Kaaraj Shubh Kar Jaana, Mere Ghar Me Padharo
Ghar Mein Padharo Gajanan Ji, Mere Ghar Me Padharo

title: Godi Mein Utha Lo
lyrics:
Godi Mein Utha Lo Meri Ma, Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ka Chota Sa Maatha
Tilak Laga Do Meree Maan Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ka Chota Sa Gala Hai
Haar Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ke Chote-Chote Haath Hain
Kangan Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Meri Gajaanan Ke Chote-Chote Paon Hain
Paayal Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Mere Gajaanan Ke Chote-Chote Ang Hain
Peetaambar Pahana Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Meri Gajaanan Ka Chota Sa Mukh Hai
Modak Khila Do Meri Ma Gajaanan Chote Hain

Godi Mein Utha Lo Meri Ma, Gajaanan Chote Hain

title: Jai Ganesh
lyrics:
Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva
Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva

Ek Dant Dayavant, Chaar Bhuja Dhaari
Maathe Pe Sindhoor Sohe, Muse Ki Savari
Paan Chadhe, Phul Chadhe, Aur Chadhe Meva
Ladduan Ka Bhog Lage, Sant Kare Seva

Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva

Andhan Ko Aankh Det, Kodhin Ko Kaaya
Baanjhan Ko Putra Det, Nirdhan Ko Maaya
Surya Shaam Sharan Aye, Safalki Je Seva
Mata Jaaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva

Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva
Mata Jaaki Parvati, Pita Mahadeva

title: Rakh Laaj Meri
lyrics:
Rakh Laaj Meri Ganpati,
Apni Sharan Mein Lijiye
Kar Aaj Mangal Ganpati,
Apni Kripa Ab Kijiye

Siddhi Vinayak Duhkh Haran,
Santap Haari Sukh Karan
Karoon Prarthna Main Nitt Prati,
Vardaan Mangal Dijiye

Teri Daya, Teri Kripa,
Hey Nath Hum Maange Sada
Tere Dhyan Mein Khove Mati,
Pranam Mam Ab Lijie

Karte Pratham Tav Vandana,
Tera Naam Hai Duhkh Bhanjana
Karna Prabhu Meri Shubh Gati,
Ab To Sharan Me Lijiye

Rakh Laaj Meri Ganpati,
Apni Sharan Mein Lijiye
Kar Aaj Mangal Ganpati,
Apni Kripa Ab Kijiye

title: Chale Hanuman Yaha
lyrics:
Chale Hanuman Yaha Aye,
Shri Ramji Ki Dhoon Machaye,
Dhoon Machaye Aisi Dhoon Machaye,
Sun Kar Aye Raghurai,
Shri Ramji Ki Dhoon Machaye

Sitaram Naam Dhoon Aisi Machaye,
Sunker Aye Raghurai,
Shri Ramji Ki Dhoon Machye

Bhakta Janoka Ghar Pawan Karwa,
Avo Avo Ne Raghurai,
Shri Ramji Ki Dhoon Machye

Gangaji Aye, Yamunaji Aye,
Triveni Sangam Aye,
Shri Ramji Ki Dhoon Machye

Das Janoki Yahi Vinati,
Charan Kamal Balihari,
Shri Ramji Ki Dhoon Machye

title: Cheer Ki Chati
lyrics:
Cheer Ki Chati Bole Apni,
Pawan Putra Hanuman
Mere Man Me Basay Hai Ram,
Mere Tan Me Basay Hai Ram

Sita Haran Kiya Ravan Me
Prabhuji The Akulaye,
Hanuman Ne Sitaji Ko
Prabhu Sandesh Sunaye,
Hanuman Je Karne Aye
Prabhu Ji Ke Gungaan

Lagee Lakshman Ji Ko Shakti
Dekh Prabhu Ghabaraye,
Bhor Se Pehale Hanumanji
Daulaa Girile Aye,
Uth Baite Lakshman Ji Lekar,
Shri Ram Ka Naam

Vaanar Sena Dekh Ke Ravan
Ki Sena Ghabaraye
Palak Jhapatke Hanumata Ne,
Lanka Mein Aag Lagae
Rahe Prabhu Ke Sath Mitakar
Ravan Ka Abhimaan
Mere Man Me Basay Hai Ram,
Mere Tan Me Basay Hai Ram

title: Duniya Chale Na
lyrics:
Duniya Chale Na Shri Ram Ke Bina
Ram Ji Na Chale Hanuman Ke Bina

Jab Se Ramayan Padh Li Hai,
Ek Baat Maine Samajh Li Hai,
Ravan Mare Na Shri Ram Ke Bina,
Lanka Jale Na Hanuman Ke Bina

Lakshman Ka Bachna Mushkil Tha,
Kon Buti Laane Ke Kaabil Tha,
Lakhshman Bache Na Shri Ram Ke Bina,
Buti Mile Na Hanuman Ke Bina,

Sita Haran Ki Kahani Suno,
Banwari Meri Zubaani Suno,
Wapas Mile Na Shri Ram Ke Bina,
Pata Chale Na Hanuman Ke Bina

Baithe Singhasan Pe Shri Ram Ji,
Charnon Mein Baithe Hai Hanuman Ji,
Mukti Mile Na Shri Ram Ke Bina,
Bhakti Mile Na Hanuman Ke Bina

title: Veer Hanumana Ati Balwana
lyrics:
Veer Hanumana Ati Balwana,
Ram Naam Rasiyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

Jo Koi Aave, Araj Lagave,
Sabaki Suniyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

Bajrang Bala, Pheru Thari Mala,
Sankat Hariyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

Na Koi Sangi, Hath Ki Tangi,
Jaldi Hariyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

Arji Hamari, Maraji Tumhari,
Kripa Kariyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

Ramji Ka Pyara, Siya Ka Dulara,
Sankat Hariyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

Veer Hanumana Ati Balwana,
Ram Naam Rasiyo Re,
Prabhu Man Basiyo Re

title: Aisan Manohar Mangal
lyrics:
Aisan Manohar Mangal
Murat Suhavan Sundar
Surat No Ho
Ye Rajaji
Ye Kare Ta Relahab
Jarorat Muhorat Khobasorat Ho

Hamaara Janaat Babua Ji Em Hoihain Na, Na Lalana Diem Hoihain Ho
He Lalana, He Lalana, He Lalana
Hind Ke Sitaara, I Ta See Em Hoihain Ose Upara Peem Hoihain Ho

Babua Hamaar Maharaj Hoihain Rajadhiraj Hoihain Ho
He Lalana, He Lalana, He Lalana
Dhaatu Mein Heera Pukharaj Hoihain Sirava Ke Taj Hoihain Ho

title: Banke Bihari
lyrics:
Banke Bihari Kajrare Mote Mote Tere Nain
Hy Najar Na Lagda Oy Hoy Hoy
Najar Na Lagda Oy Hoy Hoy
Najar Na Lagda…

Kajal Ki Kori Oy Hoy Hoy
Mere Jigar Marori Oy Hoy Hoy
Ras Ras Mein Bhori Oy Hoy Hoy
Me Toh Haari Re Kajrare More Mote Tere Nain

Aankhon Ka Kajal Oy Hoy Hoy
Mere Jigar Ke Ghalin Oy Hoy Hoy
Tere Pyaar Me Pagal Oy Hoy Hoy
Kar Daari Re Kajrare Mote Mote Tere Nain

Tere Mukut Ke Latkin Oy Hoy Hoy
Tere Adhar Ke Muskan Oy Hoy Hoy
Deva Ke Matkin Oy Hoy Hoy
Balihaari Re Kajrare Mote Mote Tere Nain

Tere Reet Hai Tere Oy Hoy Hoy
Tere Preet Hai Tere Oy Hoy Hoy
Tere Jeet Hai Tere Oy Hoy Hoy
Main Toh Haari Kajrare Mote Mote Tere Nain

title: Bansiwale Ne
lyrics:
Bansiwale Ne Gher Laye,
Akeli Radha Jamuna Gaye

Sir Pe Ghhada, Ghhade Pe Gagari,
Gagari Phor Gaye, Akeli Radha Jamuna Gaye

Haar More Bheeja, Shringaar More Bheeja,
Chunari Bheej Gaye, Akeli Radha Jamuna Gaye

title: Bihari Braj Mein
lyrics:
Bihari Braj Mein Ghar Mera, Basa Doge Toh Kya Hoga,
Mujhe Woh Basuri Apni Suna Do Ge, Toh Kya Hoga
Kripa Karke Jo Vrindavan Bula Loge Toh Kya Hoga

Kabhi Tum Sumane Aate, Kabhi Phir Dur Ho Jate
Hamare Bich Ka Parada Hata Dohe Toh Kya Hoga

Tera Didar Pane Ko Tarasti Hai Meri Nazare,
Agar Dasi Ko Charno Se Laga Loge Toh Kya Hoga

title: Choti Choti Gaiya
lyrics:
Choti Choti Gaiya Chotay Chotay Gwaal
Chotoso Mero Madan Gopal

Aage Aage Gaiya Pichay Pichay Gwaal
Beech-May Mero Madan Gopal

Kaari Kaari Gaiya Goray Goray Gwaal
Shyam Baran Mero Madan Gopal

Ghaasn Khaavay Gaiya Dhudh Peevay Gwaal
Maakhan Khaavay Mero Madan Gopal

Choti Choti Lakuti Chotay Chotay Haath
Bansi Bajaaway Mero Madan Gopal

Choti Choti Sakhiyaan Madhuban Baal
Raas Rachaaway Mero Madan Gopal

Choti Choti Gaiya Chotay Chotay Gwaal
Chotoso Mero Madan Gopal

title: Dwarika No Nath
lyrics:
Dwarika No Nath Maro Raja Ranchod Che
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Re
Aene Mane Naya Lagadi Mara Vala
Radhaji No, Radhaji No, Radhaji No, Radhaji No
Radhano Kanh Maro Rajaa Ranchod Che
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Re

Jashodano Baal Maro Raja Ranchod Che
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Re
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Mara Vala
Nandjino Laal Maro Raja Ranchod Che
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Re

Gayono Gowal Maro Raja Ranchod Che
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Re
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi Mara Vala
Daakorno Thakur Maro Raja Ranchod Che
Aene Mane Maya Lagadi

title: Faag Khelan
lyrics:
Faag Khelan Barasane Aae Hain,
Natavar Nand Kishor

Gher Lae Sab Gali Rangili,
Chhay Rahi Chhabi Chhata Chhabili,
Jin Dhol Mrdang Bajaaye Hain Bansee Ki Ghanaghor

Jur Mil Ke Sab Sakhiyan Aae,
Umad Ghata Ambar Mein Chhai,
Jin Abeer Gulal Udaye Hain, Marat Bhar Bhar Jhor

Le Rahe Chot Gvaal Dhaalan Pe,
Kesar Keech Male Gaalan Pe,
Jin Hariyal Baans Mangaaye Hain Chalan Lage Chahun Or

Bhee Abeer Ghor Andhiyaaree,
Deekhat Nahee Ku Nar Aur Naree,
Jin Raadhe Sen Chalaaye Hain, Pakade Maakhan Chor

Jo Laala Ghar Jaano Chaaho,
To Horee Ko Phaguva Lao,
Jin Shyaam Sakha Bulae Hain, Baantat Bhar Bhar Jhor

Radhe Joo Ke Ha Ha Khao,
Sab Sakhiyan Ke Ghar Pahunchao,
Jin Ghaaseeraam Pad Gae Hain, Lagee Shyaam Sang Dor

title: He Karuna
lyrics:
He Karuna Na Karna Ra, Tari Karuna No Koi Paar Nathi
He Sankat Na Hara Nara, Tari Karuna No Koi Paar Nathi

Paapo Karya Che E Eva, Toh Bhulyo Tari Seva
Mari Bhulyo Na Bhulnara, Tari Karuna No Koi Paar Nathi

Hu Andar Ma Thaine Raaji, Khelyo Chu Avli Baaji
Avli-Savali Karana Ra, Tari Karuna Na Koi Paar Nathi

Param-Krupalu Vaala, Meh Pidhya Vikh Na Pyala
Vikh No Amruth Karnara Ra, Tari Karuna Na Koi Paar Nathi

BhaleJoru Kachoru Thai, Tu Toh Mahvar Sant Kehlaya
Mithi Chaya Je Denara Ra, Tari Karuna Na Koi Paar Nathi

Jadto Nathi Mann Kinaro, Maro Kyaati Aave Aaro
Mara Sacha Kevanhara Ra, Tari Karuna Na Koi Paar Nathi

Che Maru Jeevan Udasi, Tu Sharne Le Avinasi
Mara Dil Ma Hai Rangara Ra, Tari Karuna Na Koi Paar Nathi

title: Kaise Jao Re
lyrics:
Kaise Jao Re Kanhaiya Pyare Tori Nagari
Ho Ho Teri Nagari, Pyari Tori Nagari

Thare Bharo Du Pat Nai Gagar
Nihuri Bharo Bheejak Chunari

Dheere Chalo Ghar Balak Rove
Dauri Chalo Chilkat Gagari

Raat Andheri Raho Nahi Sujhe
Dooje Hai Yamuna Gaheri

title: Kanha Ne Makhan
lyrics:
Kanha Ne Makhan Bhave Re, Kanha Ne Misri Bhave Re

Dhari Dharavu Ne Ghughra Dharu Gheabhar Dharu Say
Mohan Thar Ne Mal Puva Pan x2
Makhan Jeva Nahi O Ho Ho Makhan Jeva Nahi
Kanha Ne Makhan Bhave Re, Kanha Ne Misri Bhave Re

Shiro Dharavu Ne Shikand Dharu Sutalfeni Say
Upar Taaja Ghee Dharu Pan x2
Makhan Jeva Nahi O Ho Ho Makhan Jeva Nahi
Kanha Ne Makhan Bhave Re, Kanha Ne Misri Bhave Re

Jat Jat Na Meva Dharavu Dudh Sakar Ne Dahi
Chappan Bhog Samagri Dharu Pan x2
Makhan Jeva Nahi O Ho Ho Makhan Jeva Nahi
Kanha Ne Makhan Bhave Re, Kanha Ne Misri Bhave Re

Gopi Makhan Dharyu Ne Hath Jori Ubhi Raay
Deena Natha Re Jatyaare x2
Naacha Thay Thay Thay O Ho Ho Naacha Thay Thay Thay
Kanha Ne Makhan Bhave Re, Kanha Ne Misri Bhave Re

title: Karake Isharo Bulai
lyrics:
Karake Ishaaro Bulai Gai Re,
Barsane Ki Chori, Radha Gori Gori,
Jo Kanha Mero Gaanv Na Jaane,
Oonche Barsanon Batai Gai Re,
Barsane Ki Chori, Radha Gori Gori,

Jo Kanha Mero Ghar Nahin Jaane,
Oonchee Haveli Batai Gai Re,
Barsane Ki Chori, Radha Gori Gori,

Mere Angana Mein Tulasi Ko Birava,
Tulasi Ko Birava Batai Gai Re,
Barsane Ki Chori, Radha Gori Gori,

Jo Kanha Mero Naam Na Jaane,
Radha Rangili Batai Gai Re,
Barsane Ki Chori, Radha Gori Gori

title: Krishna Damodaram
lyrics:
Krishna Damodoram Vasudevem Hari
Sharanagat Hoye Pukar Kari

Vinti Sunlo Shyam Murari
Tum Bin Kaun Khabar Le Humari
Dwar Pari Hai Tumhari Shabhari

Tere Naam Me Laakho Kare
Reh Gaye Hum Bey Bas Dhukhyari
Bhol Vhipat Kyon Hum Bepari

Nach Raha Braj Mandal Sara
Gunj Raha Tera Jai Jai Kara
Naam Dhuni Ki Ban Se Jari

title: Krishna Jinka
lyrics:
Krishna Jinka Naam Hai,
Gokul Jinka Dhaam Hai
Aise Shri Bhagwan Ko,
Barambar Pranaam Hai

Yashoda Jinki Maiya Hai,
Nandji Bapaiyaa Hai
Aise Shri Gopal Ko,
Barambar Pranam Hai

Loot Loot Dadhi Makhan Khayo,
Gwal Baal Sang Dhenu Charayo
Aise Leela Dham Ko,
Barambaar Pranam Hai

Dhrupad Suta Ki Laaj Bachaayo,
Gajendra Gaj Ko Fand Chhudayo
Aise Kirpa Dhaam Ko,
Baarambar Pranam Hai

title: Mein Toh Vrindavan
lyrics:
Mein Toh Vrindavan Jaonge Chahe Raakho Ya Maaro
Main Toh Govind Gun Gaonge Chahe Raakho Ya Maaro

Vrindavan Mein Banke Bihaari 
Unse Main Naina Ladaonge, Chahe Raakho Ya Maaro.

Vrindavan Mein Yamuna Maharani
Jaake Mein Gota Lagaongi, Chahe Raakho Ya Maaro

Raadha Vallabh Ki Chhavi Nyaari
Unako Main Jhoola Jhulaonge, Chahe Raakho Ya Maaro

Vrindavan Ki Kunj Galan Mein
Radhe Radhe Main To Gaungee, Chahe Raakho Ya Maaro

title: Mero Man
lyrics:
Mero Man Lagyo Barsane Mein,
Jahan Viraje Radha Rani,
Man Hatyo Ye Duniyadari Se,
Jahan Mile Khara Pani,

Mujhe Duniya Se Nahi Koi Kaam,
Main to Ratu Radha Radha Naam,
Darshan Karoo Subah Shaam,
Mere Man Mein Viraje Shyam Deewani,

Jahan Viraje Radha Rani,
Mero Man Lagyo Barsane Mein

Mere Man Mein Na Lage Koi Rang,
Main to Rahoon Santan Ke Sang,
Mere Man Mein Badhat Umang,
Barsana Vraj Ki Rajdhani,

Jahan Viraje Radha Rani,
Mero Man Lagyo Barsane Mein

Mujhe Duniyan Se Nahi Lena Dena,
Ye Jagat Hai Ek Sapna,
Yaha Koi Nahi Apna,
Meri Apni Brashbhan Dulari,

Jahan Viraje Radha Rani,
Mero Man Lagyo Barsane Mein

title: Nandlala Krishna
lyrics:
Nandlala Krishna Murari, Tere Charnon Pe Balhaari
Tu Hi Raas Rachaiyya, Tu Hi Hai Gopala
Tu Hi Murliwala, Tu Hi Giridhaari

Shyam Varn Pitaambar Dhaari, Gal Vaijyantimala
Kunj Galan Mein Bansi Bajaye, Gowardhan Gopala
Mormukut Ki Shobha Nyaari Kitni Sundar, Chhabi Tumhari

Bas Gayi Tere Saanwli Surat Bhakt Jano Ke Man Mein
Hamne Chaaron Dhaam Hai Paaye, Tere Hi Charnon Mein
Pooje Tujhako Duniya Saari Jai Gopala Jai Banwaari

title: Nazar Mein Rehte Ho
lyrics:
Nazar Mein Rehte Ho,
Magar Tum Nazar Nahi Aate
Yeh Dil Bulaye Shyam Tumhe Par,
Tum Nahi Aate

Sanso Ki Har Dor Pukaare Sanwariyan,
Naina Tujhko Hi Dhonde Hai Sanwariyan,
Tu Jo Naino Me Aa Jaye Meri,
Naino Ko Band Karo Sanwariyan,
Idhar Nahi Aate, Sanware,
Idhar Nahi Aate

Hota Hai Abbaas Tumhara Sanwariyan,
Lagta Hai Tu Paas Khada Hai Sanwariyan.
Girane Ke Pehele Hi Sambhalo Ge,
Hamko Yakeen Hai Ye Sanwariyan,
Mehar Nahi Karate Sanware,
Mehar Nahi Karate

Reeva Tera Naam Jape Hai Sanwariyan,
Har Pal Teri Raah Take Hai Sanwariyan,
Tere Aane Ki Aas Liye Dil Mein,
Tak Tak Naina Thake Hai Sanwariyan,
Khabar Nahi Lete, Humaari
Khabar Nahi Lete

title: Shyam Dhale
lyrics:
Shyam Dhale Jamuna Kinare, Kinare
Aaja Radhe Aaja Tohe Shyam Pukaare

Radha Sharmaye, Manawa Ghabaraye
Paniya Bharne Woh, Jaye Na Jaye
Khadi Roke Brijbala, Brij Mein Hai Hori
Kanha Rang Denge, Mohe Haai Barjori

Koyi Kahe Shyaam Se Na Bansuri Bajaaye
Chain Kisi Ka Woh, Chitchor Na Churaaye
Dagmag Dole Jiyaa Ki Naiya
Chhede Bansi Kanhaiyaa

Panghat Pe Sakhiyan, Karti Hai Batiyan
Mohan Se Laagi, Radha Ki Akhiyan

title: Shyama Aan Baso
lyrics:
Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Me
Meri Umar Beet Gai Gokul
Main Banke Dulhan Aaj Saji
Bas Tum Hi Ho Mere Tan Man Me

Shyama Raste Mein Baag Laga Jaana,
Phul Binugi Teri Mala Ke Liye

Shyama Raste Mein Kuaan Khudva Jaana,
Main to Neer Bharungi Tere Liye

Shyama Murali Madhur Suna Jaana,
Mohe Aake Darash Dikha Jaana

Shyama Vrindavan Mein Aa Jaana,
Aakar Ke Raas Racha Jaana

Shyama Makhan Churane Aa Jaana,
Aakar Ke Dahi Bikhra Jaana

title: Yashomati Maiyaa
lyrics:
Yashomati Maiyaa Se Bole Nandalaala
Raadha Kyon Gori Main Kyon Kaala

Boli Muskaati Maiya, Lalan Ko Bataaya
Kaali Andhiyari Aadhi, Raat Men Tu Aaya
Laadala Kanhaiya Meraa
Kaali Kamali Vaala
Isi Liye Kaala

Boli Muskaati Maiya, Sun Mere Pyaare
Gori Gori Raadhika Ke, Nain Kajaraare
Kaale Nainon Vaali Ne
Aisa Jaadu Daala
Isi Liye Kaala

title: Ham Toh Dware Pe Aas Lagae Baithe
lyrics:
Ham Toh Dware Pe Aas Lagae Baithe
Lagae Baithe, Lagae Baithe
Ham Toh Dwaare Pe Aas Lagae Baithe.

Maiya Hamaari Parvat Par Rahate
Ham Toh Pahale Se Dhunee Ramae Baithe.
Ham Toh Dwaare Pe Aas Lagae Baithe.

Maiya Hamaari Baagon Mein Rahate
Ham Toh Pahale Se Phulava Bichhae Baithe
Ham Toh Dware Pe Aas Lagae Baithe

Maiya Humaari Mandir Mein Rahate
Hum Toh Pahale Se Jyoti Jalaye Baithe
Ham Toh Dware Pe Aas Lagae Baithe

Maiyra Humaari Singhasan Pe Rahete
Hum Toh Pahale Se Sheesh Navai Baithe
Ham Toh Dware Pe Aas Lagae Baithe

title: Kesariyo Rang Tane Lagyo
lyrics:
Kesariyo Rang Tane Lagyo Olya Garba
Kesariyo Rang Tane Lagyo Re Lol
Jini Jini Jadiyo Melavo Olya Garba
Jini Jini Jadiyo Melavo Re Lol

Kona Kona Mathe Ghumyo Olya Garba
Kona Kona Mathe Ghumyo Re Lol
Amba Ma Ne Mathe Ghumyo Olya Garba
Amba Ma Ne Mathe Ghumyo Rae Lol

Pavagadh Dhame Ghumi Avyo Olya Garba
Pavagadh Dhame Ghumi Avyo Re Lol

Shankalapur Ghumi Avyo Olya Garba
Shankalapur Ghumi Avyo Re Lol

Rajpara Dhame Ghumi Avyo Olya Garba
Rajpara Dhame Ghumi Avyo Re Lol

Khodal Ma Ne Mathe Ghumyo Olya Garba
Khodal Ma Ne Mathe Ghumyo Re Lol

title: Khel Khel Re Bhavani Ma
lyrics:
Khel Khel Re Bhavani Ma, Jai Jai Ambe Ma
Jai Jai Ambe Ma, Jai Jai Ambe Ma
He Tu To Pava Ni Patrani Ma, Jai Jai Ambe Ma

Madi Kholdal Khamkari, Jai Ho
Randal Bhavani, Jai Ho
Chorvad Bhavani, Jai Ho
Chamunda Bhavani, Jai Ho
Tulja Bhavani, Jai Ho
Amba Bhavani, Jai Ho
Umiya Bhavani, Jai Ho
Ashapura Madi, Jai Ho

Ho Chandika Nu Roop Dhari Ne Asuro Saumharya
Asuro Tumhari Ma Bhakto Ne Ugarya
Jai Jai Ambe Ma Ho Jai Jai Ambe Ma
Khamma Khamma Re Mahakali Ma
Jai Jai Ambe Ma

title: Maiya Navraton Mein
lyrics:
Maiya Navraton Mein, Jab Dharti Par Aati Hai,
Kisko Kya Dena Hai, Ye Soch Ke Aati Hai,

Pahale Navaratri Main Maan Sab Kee Khabar Letee,
Dooje Navratri Mein Apane Khaate Mein Likh Letee Hai,
Tije Navratri Mein Baat Aage Badhte Hai

Chautha Navratri Mein, Ma Aasaan Lagati Hai,
Panchve Navratri Mein, Ma Aa Gayi Batate Hain,
Chatave Navratri Me, Ma Darshan Karavati Hai,

Sate Navratri Mein, Khol Detee Khajaane Hai,
Athe Navaraatre Mein Lag Jaatee Lutaane Hai,
Novee Navaraatre Mein, Dono Hatho Se Lutati Hai,

Dasave Din Maata Kee Vidaee Jab Aatee Hai,
Saare Dharatee Ke Logo Ki Ankhe Bhar Aati Hai,
Rama Phir Aaungee Vada Karake Chalee Jaatee Hai

title: Sati Sitaji
lyrics:
Sati Sitaji Rathma Beitha
Ane Lakhman Hakana Haro
Rusimuni Na Aasram Aavya Ne
Avyo Che Gangno Kinaro Re Lakhman
Vaka Nathi Kami Maro Re

E Lakhman Kahe, Suno Mata Ji
Khel Karamno Nyaro
Koi Karane, E Ramji Ruthiya
Tyag Karo Mai Maro Mane Lakhman

Rota Radiye Sitaji Bolya,
Su Aparadha Na Maro
Tan Man Thi Sri Ramji Ne Sevya
Sati Dharam Mein Toh Dharo Re Lakhman

title: Swamini Siya
lyrics:
Swamini Siya Ji Humari,
Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

Nai Har Mithilia, Raj Biraje
Avadh Puri Sasural, Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

Jinki Sasurat, Mahi Pati Dasharath
Swami Shri Yamadh Bihari, Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

Debar Bharath, Lakhan Ri Pusudan
Isht Dev Tripurari, Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

Jinki Ang Se, An Gin Nik Si
Uma Rama Brahmani, Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

Ridhi Sidhi, Charano Ki Daasi
Hanumat Panv Pujari, Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

Roop Lata, Kaliyug Ka Kari He
Rakhi He Siya Ji Samhari, Fikir Mohe Kaahi Ki

title: Avadh Mein Ram
lyrics:
Saja Do Ghar Ko Gulashan Sa
Avadh Mein Raam Aaye Hain
Mere Sarakaar Aae Hain
Avadh Mein Raam Aaye Hain
Mere Sarakaar Aae Hain
Lage Kutiya Bhee Dulhan See
Mere Sarakaar Aae Hain

Pakhaaro Inake Charano Ko
Bahakar Prem Ki Ganga
Pakhaaro Inake Charano Ko
Bahakar Prem Ki Ganga
Bichha Do Apani Palako Ko
Mere Sarakaar Aae Hain

Saja Do Ghar Ko Gulashan Sa
Avadh Mein Raam Aaye Hain

Umad Aaee Meri Aankhen
Dekh Kar Apane Bhagavan Ko
Umad Aaee Meri Aankhen
Dekh Kar Apane Bhagavan Ko
Huee Raushan Meri Galiya
Huee Raushan Meri Galiya
Mere Sarakaar Aaen Hain

title: Banwari Re
lyrics:
Banwari Re,
Jeene Ka Sahara Tera Naam Re,
Mujhe Duniya Walon Se Kya Kaam Re

Jhuthi Duniya, Jhuthe Bandhan,
Jhuthi Hai Ye Maya,
Jhutha Saans Ka Aana Jana,
Jhuthi Hai Ye Kaya,
Yahan Sancho Tero Naam Re.

Rang Mein Tere, Rang Gayi Girdhar,
Chhod Diya Jag Sara,
Ban Gayi Tere Prem Ke Jogan,
Le Ke Man Ektara,
Mujhe Pyara Tera Dham Re.

Darshan Tera, Jis Din Paun,
Har Chinta Mit Jaye,
Jeevan Mera in Charanon Mein,
Aas Ki Jyot Jalaye,
Meri Banha Pakad Lo Shyam Re

title: Bhajo Re Bhaiya
lyrics:
Bhajo Re Bhaiya,
Ram Govind Hari,

Jap Tap Sadhan,
Kachhu Nahin Lagat,
Kharachat Nahin Gathari,
Bhajo Re Bhaiya,
Ram Govind Hari

Santat Sampat,
Sukh Ke Karan,
Jaase Bhul Pari,
Bhajo Re Bhaiya,
Ram Govind Hari

Kahat Kabira,
Jin Mukh Ram Nahin,
Ta Mukh Dhul Bhari,
Bhajo Re Bhaiya,
Ram Govind Hari

Bhajo Re Bhaiya,
Ram Govind Hari

title: Chitrakoot Ke Ghat
lyrics:
Chitrakoot Ke Ghat Ghat Par Shabri Dekhe Baat,
Ram Mere Aa Jao, Ram Mere Aa Jao

Apane Ram Ji Ko, Kahan Main Bithaoon,
Kahan Main Bithaoon, Tuti Phooi Khat-Khat Pa,
Bichhaya Purana Taat, Ram Mere Aa Jao

Apane Ram Ji Ko, Kya Main Khilaoon,
Kya Main Khilaoon, Chhote Chhote Ped-Ped Pa,
Lage Sunahari Ber, Ram Mere Aa Jao

Apane Ram Ko, Kaya Main Pilaoon,
Kaya Main Pilaoon, Kapala Gaadha Dudh,
Dudh Mein Padi Malai Khub, Ram Mere Aa Jao

Apane Ram Ji Ko, Kahaan Main Jhulaoon,
Kahaan Main Jhulaoon, Chhoti Dali Aam-Aam Pa,
Jhoole Seeta Ram, Ram Mere Aa Jao

Apane Ram Ji Ko, Kaise Main Rijhaoon,
Kaise Main Rijhaoon, Deen Heen Mohe Jaan,
Na Hi Koi Bhakti Gyan, Ram Mere Aa Jao

Chitrakoot Ke Ghat-Ghat Par, Shabari Dekhe Baat,
Ram Mere Aa Jao, Ram Mere Aa Jao

title: He Rom Rom Me
lyrics:
He Rom Rom Me Basane Wale Ram, Jagat Ke Swami He Antaryaami
Mai Tujhse Kya Mangu, Mai Tujhse Kya Mangu

Aas Kaa Bandhan Tod Chuki Hu, Tujhpar Sab Kuch Chhod Chuki Hu
Naath Mere Mai Kyu Kuch Sochu, Naath Mere Mai Kyu Kuch Sochu
Tu Jaane Tera Kaam, Jagat Ke Swami He Antaryaami

Tere Charan Ki Dhul Jo Paye, Woh Kankar Hira Ho Jaaye
Bhaag Mere Jo Maine Paya, Bhaag Mere Jo Maine Paaya
In Charano Me Dhaam, Jagat Ke Swami He Antaryaami

Bhed Tera Koi Kya Pahachaane, Jo Tujhasa Ho Woh Tujhe Jaane
Tere Kiye Ko Ham Kya De Ve, Tere Kiye Ho Ham Kya De Ve
Bhale Bure Ka Naam, Jagat Ke Swami He Antaryaami

title: Janam Liye Raghuriya
lyrics:
Janam Liye Raghuraiya,
Avadh Aaj Baaje Badhaiya
Baaje Badhaiya, Aaj Baaje Badhayia

Dhaniya Avadhpur Dhan Maharaja
Ghan Ghan Teeno Maiya,
Avadh Aaj Baaje Badhayia

Keho Lutaavi An Ghan Sunma,
Dhenu Lutaavi Dhenu Gaiya,
Avadh Aaj Baaje Badhaiya

Raja Lutaavi An Ghan Sunma,
Rani Lutaavi Dhenu Gaiya,
Avadh Aaj Baaje Badhaiya

Avadhpuri Mein Dhoom Machi Hai,
Naache Log Lugaiya,
Avadh Aaj Baaje Badhaiya

title: Kaisa Sunder Hai Darbar
lyrics:
Kaisa Sundar Hai Darabar
Anupam Jhanki Ki Bahaar
Hira Moti Ki Singhasan Par
Viraje Lalan Ju

Kar Mein Teer Aur Kaman
Krit Kundal Aaleshaan.
Karate Soor Nar Muni Jan Dhyaan, Raghuvanshee Lalan Ju
Hira Moti Ki Singhasan Par Viraje Lalan Ju

Vinati Sun Lo Hai Sarakaar
Kar Do Mujhako Bhav Se Paar
Teri Hove Jay-Jay Kaar, Raghuvanshi Lalan Ju
Hira Moti Ki Singhasan Par Viraje Lalan Ju

title: Mera Ram Ki Kripa Se
lyrics:
Mera Ram Ki Krpa Se, Sab Kaam Ho Raha Hai
Karate Ho Mere Raghav,
Mera Naam Ho Raha Hai,

Patavar Ki Bina Hi, Meri Naam Chal Rahi Hai,
Hairaan Hai Zamana, Manzil Bhi Mil Rahi Hai,
Karata Nahin Main Kuchh Bhi,
Mera Kaam Ho Raha Hai,
Karate Ho Mere Raaghav , Mera Naam Ho Raha Hai

Tum Saath Ho Jo Mere, Kis Cheeg Ki Kami Hai,
Tere Siva Kisi Ki, Paravaah Bhi Nahin Hai,
Tere Saath Se Gulam Ab,
Gulpham Ho Raha Hai,
Karate Ho Mere Raaghav, Mera Naam Ho Raha Hai

Tuphaan Aandhiyon Mein, Tumane Hi Mujhako Thaama,
Tum Krshn Ban Kar Aae, Main Jab Bana Sudaama,
Tera Karam Ye Mujh Par,
Sareaam Ho Raha Hai,
Karate Ho Mere Raaghav , Mera Naam Ho Raha Hai

title: Mohi Le Lekhin
lyrics:
Mohi Le Lekhin Sajani Mora Manawa, Pahunama Raghav
He Ho Pahunama Raghav, Siya Ke Sajanama Raghav
Raja Dasharath Ke Hai Dularua, Pahunama Raghav

Akhiyan Mein Kaari Kajal, Hothawa Mein Paanak Lali
Lali Lal Sir Par Hai Pagadiya, Pahunama Raghav

Chalo Chaloo Parichhan Sakhi Hai, Dulhha Chumaavan Sakhi Hai
Cham Cham Chamke Ke He Maooriya, Pahunama Raghav

title: Payoji Maine
lyrics:
Payoji Maine Ram Ratan Dhan Payo

Vastu Amolik Di Mere Satguru
Kripa Kari Apan Ayo
Payoji Maine

Janam Janam Ki Punji Payo
Jag Mein Sabhi Khovayo
Payoji Maine

Kharachi Na Kuti Chor Na Lute
Din Din Badhat Savayo
Payoji Maine

Sat Ki Nava Khevatiya Satguru
Bhava Sagar Tar Ayo
Payoji Maine

title: Ragupati Raghav Raja Ram
lyrics:
Raghupati Raghav, Raja Ram,
Patit Pawan, Sita Ram
Sita Ram, Sita Ram
Bhaje Pyare Tu Sita Ram

Sundar Vigraha, Megha Shyam
Ganga Tulsi Shaligram

Bhadra Girishwar, Sita Ram
Bhagat Jana Priya Sita Ram

Janaki Ramana, Sita Ra
Jai Jai Raghav Sita Ram

Mukhmen Tulsi Ghatamen Ram,
Jab Bolo Tab Sitaram

Hathose Karo Gharka Kam,
Mukhase Bolo Sitaram

Kaushalyaka Vhala Ram,
Dashrathjika Pyara Ram

Bansivala Hay Ghanshyam,
Dhanushya Dhari Sitaram

title: Raja Ram Aaye
lyrics:
Raja Ram Aaye, Prabhu Ram Aaye
Mere Bhojan Ka Bhog Lagaye

Aachmani Ardhan Aarti Yahi Yaha Mahimani
Rukhi Roti Paon Prem Se Peeo Nadi Ke Pani

Bhool Karoge Yad Taj Tohe Bhojan Rukhe Sukhe
Ekadasi Aaj Mandir Me Baithai Rahoge Bookhe

title: Ram Ji Se Puche
lyrics:
Ram Ji Se Puche, Janakpur Ki Nari
Bata De Babua, Logva Dete Kahe Gaari

Tohra Se Puchu Mein O Dhanushdhari,
Ek Bhai Gor Kahe, Ek Kahe Kari,
Bata De Babua, Logva Dete Kahe Gaari

I Budha Baba Ke Pakal Pakal Daadhi,
Dekhen Mein Paatar, Khaye Bhar Thaari,
Bata De Babua, Logva Dete Kahe Gaari

Raja Dashrath Ji Kailan Hoshiyari,
Ekta Marad Par, Tin Tin Jo Naari,
Bata De Babua, Logva Dete Kahe Gaari

Kathathin Sneh Lata Man Mein Bicharin,
Hum Sab Lagaichi, Sarho Jashari,
Bata De Babua, Logva Dete Kahe Gaari

title: Ram Ka Naam Lekar
lyrics:
Raam Ka Naam Lekar Jo Mar Jayenge,
Vo Amar Naam Duniya Mein Kar Jayenge

Ye Na Pochho Ki Mar Kar Kidhar Jayenge,
Vo Jidhar Bhej Denge Udhar Jayenge
Raam Ka Naam Lekar

Toot Jae Na Mala Hari Naam Ki,
Varana Anmol Motee Bikhar Jayenge
Raam Ka Naam Lekar

Aap Mano Na Mano Khushee Apakee,
Ham Musaaphir Hai Kal Apane Ghar Jayenge

title: Ram Ko Dekh Kar
lyrics:
Ram Ko Dekh Kar, Shri Janak Nandini
Baag Mein Ja Khadi Ki Khadi Reh Gayi
Ram Dekhe Siya Ma Siya Ram Ko
Chaar Ankiyan Ladi Ki Ladi Reh Gayi

Thhe Janak Pur Gaye Dekhne Ke Liye
Sari Sakhiyan Jharokhn Se Jhakan Lage
Dekhte Hi Nazar Mil Gayi Dono Ki
Jo Jaha Thi Khadi Ki Khadi Reh Gayi

Boli Ek Sakhi Ram Ko Dekhkar
Rach Diye Hai Vidhata Ne Jodi Sughar
Par Dhanush Kaise Todenge Vaare Kunwar
Sab Mein Shanka Bani Ki Bani Reh Gayi

Boli Duji Sakhi Chhote Dekhan Main Hai
Par Chamatkaar Inka Nahi Janti
Ek Hi Baan Main Tadika Rakshasi
Uth Saki Naa Padi Ki Padi Reh Gayi

title: Ram Naam Ke Sabun Se Jo
lyrics:
Ram Naam Ke Saabun Se Jo,
Man Ka Mel Chudaiyenga,
Nirmal Man Ke Darpan Mein Waha,
Ram Ka Darshan Paega
Pata Nahi Kis Roop Me Aakar
Narayan Mil Jayega
Nirmal Man Ke Darpan Mein Waha,
Ram Ka Darshan Paega

Dar Shareer Anmol Re Pyari,
Prabhu Kripa Se Paaya Hai,
Jhoothe Jag Prapanch Mein Padh Kar,
Kyu Prabhu Ko Bisaraaya Hai,
Samay Haath Se Nikla Gaya Toh
Sir Dhun Dhun Pachtayenga
Nirmal Man Ke Darpan Mein Waha,
Ram Ka Darshan Paega

Jhooth Kapat Ninda Ko Tyaago,
Har Praane Se Pyaar Karo,
Ghar Par Aaye Ati Thi Koi Toh,
Yatha Shakti Sat Kar Karo
Pata Nahin Kis Roop Me Aakar,
Narayan Mil Jaega,
Nirmal Man Ke Darpan Mein Waha,
Ram Ka Darshan Paega

Daulat Ka Abhimaan Hai Jhootha,
Ye Toh Aani Jaanee Hai,
Raja Rank Anek Hue,
Kitano Ki Sunee Kahanee Hai
Raam Naam Ke Mahamantr Hee,
Saath Tumhaare Jaega.
Nirmal Man Ke Darpan Mein Waha,
Ram Ka Darshan Paega

title: Rama Rama Ratate Ratate
lyrics:
Rama Rama Ratate Ratate, Beete Re Umariya
Raghukal Nandan Kab Aaoge, Bhilanee Ka Dagariya

Main Shabari Bilanee Ke Jai, Bhajan Bhaav Na Jaanu Re
Ram Tere Darsha Ke Hit, Van Mein Jeevan Paloon Re
Charanakamal Se Nirmal Karado, Dasi Ke Khopadiya

Roj Savere Van Me Jakar, Phal Chun Chun Kar Laonge
Apane Prabhu Ke Sanmukh Rakh Ke, Prem Se Bhog Lagonge
Meethe Meethe Beron Ki Main, Lai Main Chabariya

title: Sabsau Sundar Mithila Dhaam
lyrics:
Sabsau Sundar Mithila Dhaam
Dosar Payab Kon Thaam
Dulha Dulhin Sita Ram, Janakpur Mein

Hum Nai Karbai Kakro Aash
Banbai Siya Raghvar Ke Daas
Jakhan Mithila Hamar Baas, Janakpur Mein

Dulha Mand Mand Muskaan
Binba Dhar Khai Nai Mukh Paan
Charan Mahavar Naina Baan, Janakpur Meinn

Sabsau Sundar Mithila Dhaam
Dosar Payab Kon Thaam
Dulha Dulhin Sita Ram, Janakpur Mein

title: Basaha Chadhal Matavalava
lyrics:
Basaha Chadhal Matavalava,
Ge Mai Shankara Ji Dulahava

Kon Haath Mein Damaru Sohe,
Kon Mein Trishulava, Kon Mein Trishulava
Kahava Se Bade, Ganga Jalava,
Ge Mai Shankar Ji Dulahava

Baam Haath Damaroo Shobhe
Dahine Mein Trishulava, Dahine Mein Trishulava
Chandava Ke Sohe Ganga Dharava,
Ge Mai Shankar Ji Dulahava

title: Dam Dam Damaru Bajaye
lyrics:
Dam Dam Dam Dam Damaru Bajaye,
Shiva Shankar Kailashpati
Yuga Yuga Soya Jeev Jagaye,
Shiva Shankar Kailashpati
Om Namah Shivaya
Bolo Om Namah Shivaya

Maathe Upar Tilak Chandrama,
Peharay Naaga Ke Mala
Damaru Kee Dhartan Pay Naache,
Shristi Ka Rakhawala
Nija Bhaktan Kay Kashta Mitaaye,
Shiva Shankar Kailashpati

Jata Joota Say Jaltay Ganga,
Bhavakay Tapa Mitaatee
Dharti Oura Pyaasay Jeevo Kee,
Maiya Pyaasa Bhujaatay
Nija Kirpa Jag Say Barsaye,
Shiva Shankar Kailashpati

title: Dim Dim Damru
lyrics:
Dim Dim Damru Baja Vela, Humar Jogiya
Hey Hamar Jogiya

Bas Ha Bailo Ki Sawari,
Chanda Sobhe Laali Laari
Thaar Ganga Ke Bahavela, Humar Jogiya

Bhola Khaate Nis Din Bhang,
Rehete Parvati Ke Sang,
Ang Bhasam Ramavela, Humar Jogiya

Dim Dim Damru Baja Vela, Humar Jogiya
Hey Hamar Jogiya

title: Dimik Dimik Damaru
lyrics:
Dimik Dimik Damaru Kar Baje,
Prem Magan Nache Bhola, Bhola

Singhi Naad Bajavat Gavat,
Latak Rahi Bagli Jhola, Bhola

Naag Phanan So Karat Aarti,
Dev Dev Gati Anmola, Bhola

Bhalchandr Sir Ganga Lahare,
Hath Liye Bhang Ki Gola, Bhola

Dimik Dimik Damaru Kar Baje,
Prem Magan Nache Bhola, Bhola

title: Sab Se Pehle
lyrics:
Sab Se Pehle Tumhe Manatee Gori Sut Maharaj
Tum Ho Devo Ki Sartaj

Ganga Jal Se Naan Karo,
Keser Chandan Tilak Lagao,
Rang Birange Phool Me Lao,
Saja Saja Ke Tum Pehenau,
Lambodar Ghaj Vadhan Vinayak Raakho Mere Laaj,
Tum Ho Devo Ki Sartaj,

Jo Ganapati Ko Pratham Manata,
Usaka Saara Dukh Mit Jata,
Ridhi Sidhi Sukh Sampati Pata,
Bhav Se Beda Paar Ho Jata,
Mere Naiya Paar Karo Mein Tera Lagaun Dhyan
Tum Ho Devo Ki Sartaj

Paravati Ke Putr Ho Pyari,
Sare Jag Ke Tum Rakhavale,
Bhole Naath Hai Pita Tumhaare,
Soorye Chandrma Mastak Dhaare,
Mere Saare Dukh Mit Jaye Devo Yeh Hai Vardaan
Tum Ho Devo Ki Sartaj

title: Shiv Math Par
lyrics:
Ho Ho Lal Dhwaja
Shiv Math Par
Shiv Math Par Sohe Lal Dhwaja

Kaun Shikar Par Gauri Biraje
Ho Kaun Shikar Par Bam Bhola
Shiv Math Par
Shiv Math Par Sohe Lal Dhwaja

Uttar Shikar Par Gauri Biraje
Ho Dakshin Shikar Par Bam Bhola
Shiv Math Par
Shiv Math Par Sohe Lal Dhwaja

Inka Haath Kanak Pichakari
Inka Haath Pasam Jholi
Shiv Math Par
Shiv Math Par Sohe Lal Dhwaja

Gauri Ke Haath Kanak Pichakari
Bhola Ke Haath Pasam Jholi
Shiv Math Par
Shiv Math Par Sohe Lal Dhwaja

title: Paon Mein Ghungroo
lyrics:
Paon Mein Ghungroo Hathon Mein Kangana
Aae Gajanan Gora Ji Ke Angana

Tata Sa Paani, Sila Re Ubatan
Sila Re Ubatan, Sila Re Ubatan
Nahae Gajanan, Shanker Ji Ke Angana
Dhire Dhire Gora Julay Rahe Palana

Paat Pitambar, Dhwaja Dhovati
Dhwaja Dhovati, Dhwaja Dhovati
Pehane Re Gajanan, Bhole Ji Ke Angana
Dhire Dhire Gora Julay Rahe Palana

Ghis Ghis Chandan, Bhari Re Katori
Bhari Re Katori, Bhari Re Katori
Tilak Lagae Rahe, Bhola Ji Ke Angana
Dhire Dhire Gora Julay Rahe Palana
